affiliation.text: I'm a BS Software Engineering student @

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
education.university: National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (FAST-NUCES)
education.medals: 4x Gold Medalist (Fall '25, Spring '25, Fall '24, Fall '23), Silver Medalist (Spring '24)

experience.org: University of Winnipeg, Canada — Mitacs Globalink Research Intern

projects.name: Integrating Generative AI and Genomic Perturbation in Breast Cancer Radiogenomics
bullets: Developing conditional diffusion models and cGANs for multi-omics-conditioned image generation to map how individual genes influence tumor MRI characteristics.
Synthesizing medical images under single-gene-level perturbed omics conditions to uncover novel biomarkers and key molecular mechanisms driving imaging phenotypes like shape, texture, and intensity.
Architecting RadGMap, an interactive web-based tool linking imaging features with gene-level perturbations to support clinicians in early detection and personalized treatment strategies.
Conducting comprehensive statistical analysis and pathway enrichment, with findings being compiled for an upcoming journal publication.

experience.org: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIMS) Lab, FAST-NUCES — Research Assistant

projects.name: Detection of Physical Altercations in Public Places Using AI-Enabled Surveillance
bullets: Conducting research on real-time violence and anomaly detection using deep learning and computer vision frameworks for public safety applications.
Designed and implemented Continual Learning mechanisms based on Retrospective Experience Replay Deep Neural Networks (RER-DNN) to enable models to adapt continuously without catastrophic forgetting.
Led experimentation for model generalization across multiple surveillance environments, improving detection accuracy and reducing false positives.
Contributed to the design of a planned nationwide deployment system across five FAST-NUCES campuses, featuring real-time alerting and cloud-based video analytics.

experience.org: National Centre of Robotics and Automation (NCRA), UAV Lab, FAST-NUCES — Research Assistant

projects.name: Anomaly Detection in Aviation Cyber-Physical Systems
bullets: Conducted anomaly detection research for aviation cyber-physical systems to enhance UAV reliability and flight safety.
Designed and assessed deep learning architectures including Autoencoders, Temporal CNNs, and LSTMs on large-scale NASA aviation datasets.
Supervised undergraduate interns during Summer 2025, providing guidance on model experimentation and interpretability.
Performed structured literature reviews to support algorithm selection and experimental design.

projects.name: Q-DERMX — Quantum-Classical AI for Skin Disease Detection (Blaise Pascal Quantum Challenge)
bullets: Engineered a hybrid Quantum-Classical AI classifier integrating ResNet18 with Parameterized Quantum Circuits (PQCs) via PennyLane to distinguish visually similar skin diseases.
Achieved 82.71% classification accuracy, outperforming classical CNN baselines by utilizing quantum feature mapping to reduce labeled data dependency by up to 50%.
Recognized among the Global Top 15 teams out of 137 across 70+ nationalities.

projects.name: AI-Driven Retail Surveillance Analytics
bullets: Developed a computer vision system for detecting ice cream scoop theft and misconduct in retail environments using continuous video monitoring.
Built and annotated a custom CCTV dataset focused on human-object interaction patterns for supervised deep learning models.
Showcased the use of AI-driven surveillance analytics to improve transparency and accountability in small retail operations.

publications.title: Confidence-Based Experience Replay for Continual Learning in Violence Detection Systems
publications.authors: Muhammad Ghaus, Zoobiya Aalam, Shahela Saif, Saira Qamar, Hasan Mujtaba

publications.title: Synthetic Radiogenomics in Breast Cancer: Mapping Gene Communities to MRI Phenotypes Using Conditional Diffusion Models

projects.title: Quantum-Classical AI Framework for Skin Disease Classification
projects.desc: Engineered a hybrid Quantum-Classical AI diagnostic pipeline integrating ResNet18 and Parameterized Quantum Circuits to classify visually similar skin diseases with 82.71% accuracy.

projects.title: Continual Learning via RER-DNN for Real-Time Violence Detection
projects.desc: Built a scalable, real-time violence detection framework utilizing Continual Learning (RER-DNN), achieving 98% accuracy on the Bullying10K dataset for multi-campus deployment.

projects.title: Semantic Product Matching using Lightweight Transformers
projects.desc: Developed a semantic retrieval system (React, FastAPI, MongoDB) integrating the all-MiniLM-L6-v2 sentence transformer to generate dense vector embeddings for efficient similarity matching across e-commerce text datasets.

projects.title: Hybrid Transformer-CNN for Machine-Generated Text Detection
projects.desc: Created a high-performance hybrid neural network fusing DistilRoBERTa, Character-CNNs, and style features to detect machine-generated social media texts with 94.67% accuracy.

news.content: Started Mitacs Globalink Research Internship at the University of Winnipeg, Canada under Dr. Qian Liu.
Gold Medal — Secured highest semester GPA in a batch of 350 students (4th consecutive Gold).
Submitted paper on Confidence-Based Experience Replay for Continual Learning to Image and Vision Computing – Elsevier.
Appointed Lead of Research & Development at IEEE Student Chapter, FAST-NUCES.
Joined AIMS Lab at FAST-NUCES as Research Assistant for AI-enabled surveillance systems.
Gold Medal — Secured highest semester GPA in a batch of 350 students (3rd Gold).
Started Computer Vision Internship at Hexler Tech, NSTP Islamabad.
Led AI-Web Development Marathon at NASCON'25, coordinating 150+ participants across 60+ university teams.
Rector's List recognition for perfect GPA and exceptional abilities at FAST-NUCES.
Gold Medal — Secured highest semester GPA in a batch of 350 students (2nd Gold).
Appointed Teaching Assistant for Software Design and Analysis & Lab Demonstrator for Data Structures.
Joined National Centre of Robotics and Automation (NCRA) UAV Lab as Research Assistant.
Silver Medal — Secured second-highest semester GPA in a batch of 350 students.
Dean's List recognition for academic excellence at FAST-NUCES.
Gold Medal — Secured highest semester GPA in a batch of 350 students (1st Gold).
Appointed Head of AI Group at Google Developer Student Club (GDSC), FAST-NUCES.
FAST Merit Scholarship recipient for top academic performance.
Global Top 15 Finalist in Blaise Pascal Quantum Challenge (Q-DERMX) out of 137 teams across 70+ nationalities.

contact.message: I'm always open to discussing research collaborations, internship opportunities, and interesting projects in AI and software engineering.
